<!-- Thanks for contributing to pigeon. Keep PRs small and focused. -->

## What & why
<!-- One or two sentences: what this changes and the problem it solves. -->

## Type
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Refactor / chore

## Checklist
- [ ] `pytest -q` green
- [ ] `pyrefly check` clean
- [ ] `ruff check` and `ruff format --check` clean
- [ ] Tests added/updated for the change (and they actually exercise it)
- [ ] No version pinned in docs that can drift from `pyproject.toml`
- [ ] Public/contract changes are documented (`CHANGELOG.md`, `AGENTS.md` as needed)

## Notes for the reviewer
<!-- Anything non-obvious: tradeoffs, follow-ups, deliberately out of scope. -->
